steps.title: Find the consumer price
steps.content:
The consumer price is 270% of the purchase price:
$$5.00 \times 2.70 = 13.50$$
The consumer price is \$13.50.

steps.title: Apply the 70% discount
steps.content:
70% off means the customer pays 30% of the consumer price (100% − 70% = 30%):
$$13.50 \times 0.30 = 4.05$$
The discounted price of each remaining book is \$4.05.
